data.title: Court temporarily stops Tennessee from taking action against Kalshi
data.description:
Kalshi is free to continue operating in Tennessee for now, as a federal judge blocked state regulators from taking action after the prediction market sued.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/court-temporarily-stops-tennessee-taking-action-against-kalshi?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Gate Alpha is launching its 143rd points airdrop, where holders of the corresponding points can be among the first to claim 0.45, 0.95, or 1.95 GT.
data.description: According to official news, Gate Alpha will launch its 143rd GT points airdrop on January 13th at 17:00 (UTC+8). This airdrop will use a tiered airdrop model with high, medium, and low tiers. Users holding 136 ≤ Gate Alpha points ≤ 149 can receive 0.45 GT airdrop tokens, consuming 11 Gate Alpha points; users holding 150 ≤ Gate Alpha points ≤ 181 can receive 0.95 GT airdrop tokens, consuming 13 Gate Alpha points; and users holding ≥ 182 Gate Alpha points can receive 1.95 GT airdrop tokens, consuming 14 Gate Alpha points. Gate Alpha now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, Gate Layer, BNB Chain, Base, SUI, ARB, World Chain, AVAX, Polygon, LINEA, ZK, OP, and Berachain. It also enables seamless trading of tokens across the entire chain through the contract address search function, opening up cross-chain transaction links and making all on-chain tokens available with a single click.

data.title: AIxCrypto launched on the AIxC Hub ecosystem platform, attracting over 200,000 users to participate in S1 Arena within five days.
data.description: On January 7th, Nasdaq-listed AIxCrypto (NASDAQ: AIXC) launched its AIxC Hub ecosystem engagement platform. Since the launch of its first season, S1 Arena, over 200,000 addresses have registered, with approximately 163,000 active. AIxC Hub employs a seasonal system and points mechanism, with all activities, points, rankings, and rewards calculated and settled on a seasonal basis. Around the EAI x RWA economic ecosystem and the Bestrade AI trading platform, it guides users to participate in market analysis and community interaction through a zero-capital simulation prediction mechanism. AIxC Hub will introduce more features and launch more marketing activities in the future.

data.title: Anthropic's Claude Introduces Cowork for Enhanced Task Management
data.description: According to Foresight News, artificial intelligence company Anthropic has launched Cowork under its Claude platform. Cowork is designed to simplify task management for Claude users by eliminating the need for repetitive manual context provision and output formatting. Users can submit tasks in a queue, allowing Claude to handle them concurrently without waiting for the completion of current tasks before introducing new ideas or feedback. Cowork is now available as a research preview on the macOS app, accessible to Claude Max subscribers.

data.title: Planet Midday News
data.description: 1. A whale established a $140 million short position in BTC, SOL, and ETH; 2. Uniswap founder: Celebrities using blockchain for fraud is extremely foolish; 3. Senator: The text of the Digital Asset Market Transparency Act is ready and will be reviewed on Thursday; 4. US bipartisan senators proposed clarifying the legal responsibilities of crypto developers; 5. Democrats launched BlueVault to test cryptocurrency fundraising methods; 6. Meme coin "Life K-line" on the BSC chain surged over 50% in a short period, with a market capitalization of $12.6 million; 7. A trader spent $525,000 to buy 27.72 million PsyopAnime coins, making a profit of $7.45 million on WIF; 8. Bitcoin spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $117 million yesterday, turning from net outflow to net inflow after four consecutive days of net outflow; 9. Ethereum spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $5.042 million yesterday, turning from net outflow to net inflow after three consecutive days of net outflow.

data.title: A whale deposited $10 million USDC into Lighter and hedged it with 5x leverage against LIT.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, despite the continued decline in LIT prices, a whale (0x226...1AeF) still deposited $10 million USDC into Lighter for hedging operations. This whale opened a short position in LIT with 5x leverage and simultaneously spent $2.2 million to buy 1.059 million LIT in the spot market at an average price of $2.08. The address currently holds $2.788 million USDC and may continue to buy.

data.title: Senator Lummis Negotiates Bipartisan Digital Asset Legislation
data.description:
Senator Lummis progresses Digital Asset Market Clarity Act, aiming for transparency in the U. S.
source: https://coincu.com/news/senator-lummis-bipartisan-digital-asset-legislation/

data.title: Uniswap founder: It's extremely foolish for celebrities to use blockchain to commit fraud.
data.description: Uniswap founder Hayden Adams stated in an article on the X platform that it is extremely foolish for celebrities and politicians to use blockchain for monetization through fraudulent means. Celebrities could easily monetize their tokens without engaging in rum pulls, for example, by providing practical functions such as stabilizing liquidity pools (LPs), creating holder meetings, or governance voting, and by being transparent about the details and risks of their transactions. Blockchain provides powerful tools for coordination, monetization, and value distribution, with millions of users worldwide and more assets being tokenized, and real businesses being built on it. However, some celebrities behave like fraudsters when using blockchain, failing to even realize that all transaction records are publicly transparent.

data.title: Bipartisan Bill on Digital Asset Market Set for Review
data.description: According to Odaily, Senator Cynthia Lummis announced on the X platform that a bipartisan bill, which has been in development for several months, is ready for review on Thursday. She urged her Democratic colleagues to maintain the progress achieved so far. The Digital Asset Market Clarity Act aims to provide essential transparency to ensure innovation remains in the United States while safeguarding consumer rights.

data.title: Thailand Moves To Curb ‘Grey Money’ With Tougher Crypto And Gold Regulations
data.description:
Thailand launched a crackdown on grey money, tightening gold and crypto rules and linking financial data to curb illicit flows.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/thailand-moves-curb-grey-money-tougher-crypto-regs/

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a net inflow of $5.042 million yesterday, reversing a three-day streak of net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $5.042 million yesterday (January 12th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF (ETHE), with a net inflow of $50.6744 million. ETHE's historical total net outflow is currently $5.09 billion. The second largest was the Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF (ETH), with a net inflow of $29.2823 million. ETH's historical total net inflow is currently $1.531 billion. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the BlackRock ETF (ETHA), with a net outflow of $79.8824 million. ETHA's historical total net inflow is currently $12.639 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is $18.883 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 5.04%, and a cumulative net inflow of $12.439 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $117 million yesterday, reversing four consecutive days of net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $117 million yesterday (January 12th, Eastern Time). The Fidelity ETF (FBTC) saw the largest single-day net inflow of $112 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.834 billion. This was followed by the Grayscale ETF (GBTC) with a net inflow of $64.251 million, while its historical total net outflow reached $25.347 billion. Conversely, the BlackRock ETF (IBIT) experienced the largest single-day net outflow of $70.6615 million, while its historical total net inflow reached $62.335 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $118.652 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) is 6.49%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $56.519 billion.

data.title: Senator: The text of the Digital Asset Market Transparency Bill is ready and will be considered on Thursday.
data.description: Senator Cynthia Lummis posted on the X platform that after months of effort, a bipartisan bill text is ready and will be considered on Thursday. Senator Lummis urged her Democratic colleagues not to abandon the progress made, stating that the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act will provide the necessary transparency to ensure innovation remains in the United States and protects consumer rights.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs See Significant Inflows
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, monitoring by Farside Investors reveals that U.S. Bitcoin spot ETFs have experienced a net inflow of $116.7 million, while Ethereum ETFs have seen a net inflow of $5.1 million.

data.title: The BSC blockchain's Meme coin, "Life K-line," surged over 50% in a short period, with its market capitalization temporarily reaching $12.6 million.
data.description: According to GMGN monitoring, the Meme coin "Life K-line" on the BSC chain surged over 50% within one hour, restoring its market capitalization to $12.6 million, currently priced at $0.0126. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins is highly volatile, and investors should participate with caution.
